what: shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
title: shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
text: Liquid Glass themes Shiny. glass_theme() returns bslib theme translucent surfaces, backdrop blur, system typography. Pass theme = glass_theme() fluidPage(), navbarPage(), page functions accept bslib theme. Documentation · GitHub

title: shinyglass • Liquid Glass themes for Shiny
code: # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("ericrayanderson/shinyglass")  library(shiny) library(shinyglass)  ui <- fluidPage(   theme = glass_theme(),  # or glass_theme(preset = "dark")   titlePanel("Liquid Glass"),   sliderInput("n", "Bars", 5, 30, 15),   plotOutput("plot") )  server <- function(input, output, session) {   output$plot <- renderPlot(barplot(seq_len(input$n), col = "#007AFF", border = NA)) }  shinyApp(ui, server)

what: Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
title: Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
text: Create bslib::bs_theme() styled Liquid Glass look: translucent surfaces, backdrop blur, soft depth, system typography. Pass result theme = fluidPage(), navbarPage(), bslib::page_sidebar(), page function accepts bslib theme.

title: Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
code: glass_theme(   preset = c("light", "dark"),   primary = "#007AFF",   blur = 28,   saturation = 200,   radius = "1.25rem",   ... )

title: Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
text: preset "light" "dark". Switches full color system. primary Accent color buttons, links, focus rings. Defaults system blue (#007AFF). blur Backdrop blur radius pixels. saturation Backdrop saturation percentage. radius Default border radius glass surfaces (CSS length). ... Additional arguments forwarded bslib::bs_theme().

title: Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
text: bslib::bs_theme() object suitable Shiny page functions.

title: Liquid Glass theme for Shiny — glass_theme
code: theme <- glass_theme() dark <- glass_theme(preset = "dark", primary = "#BF5AF2")  if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ library(shiny)  ui <- fluidPage(   theme = glass_theme(),   titlePanel("Liquid Glass"),   selectInput("color", "Color", c("Blue", "Purple", "Orange")),   plotOutput("plot") )  shinyApp(ui, function(...) {}) } # }

what: Liquid Glass Design Themes for Shiny Applications — shinyglass-package
title: Liquid Glass Design Themes for Shiny Applications — shinyglass-package
text: Drop-Liquid Glass themes shiny. Call glass_theme() pass result theme = fluidPage(), navbarPage(), bslib-aware page function get translucent surfaces, backdrop blur, system typography.

title: Liquid Glass Design Themes for Shiny Applications — shinyglass-package
text: Light dark presets available via glass_theme(preset = "dark"). Accent color, blur, saturation, corner radius configurable. teal apps, set options(teal.bs_theme = glass_theme()) calling teal::init().
code: library(shiny) library(shinyglass)  ui <- fluidPage(   theme = glass_theme(),   titlePanel("Liquid Glass"),   sliderInput("n", "Bars", 5, 30, 15),   plotOutput("plot") )

title: Liquid Glass Design Themes for Shiny Applications — shinyglass-package
text: Maintainer: Eric Anderson eric.ray.anderson@gmail.com Authors: Eric Anderson eric.ray.anderson@gmail.com

title: shinyglass (development version)
text: Fix contrast range value chips (sliderInput bubbles, noUi tooltips): use luminance-aware ink via glass-(), scoped badges Bootstrap surfaces unchanged. README hero uses denser bslib dashboard light/dark screenshots.

title: shinyglass 0.1.0
text: Initial release. glass_theme() returns bslib theme Liquid Glass styling shiny apps: translucent surfaces, backdrop blur, soft depth, system typography. Light dark presets, options accent color, blur, saturation, corner radius. Works fluidPage(), navbarPage(), bslib::page_sidebar(), bslib-aware page functions. Pass theme via theme = glass_theme(), teal apps via options(teal.bs_theme = glass_theme()). Styles common Bootstrap Shiny surfaces (cards, navbars, sidebars, inputs, tables, plots, modals) holds denser UIs leaflet maps, DT, shinyWidgets, bs4Dash, teal filter panels.
